sentence_reviews.text: Paged attention manages key–value cache blocks through virtual-memory-like allocation so variable-length generations share accelerator memory efficiently.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Kwon et al. introduce PagedAttention for LLM serving, using virtual-memory-inspired paging to manage KV-cache blocks and reduce memory waste for variable-length requests.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported by the PagedAttention paper.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Paged attention & KV-memory management is to connect Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling, KV cache & recurrent inference state to downstream capabilities including Large language models, Conversational assistants & chatbots.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support some underlying mechanisms, but this downstream capability list is atlas graph positioning rather than a directly sourced claim.
sentence_reviews.notes: Use a narrower claim or add sources for each downstream dependency if exact verification is required.
